summary: Crisp soundboard recording of an intense show featuring the debut of Unbroken Chains
review: Attendees rave about this performance as the best of nine shows they saw, highlighting a powerful vibe, an intense crowd, and the first-ever live rendition of "Unbroken Chains." The soundboard source is described as very crisp and respectable, making the recording pleasant to listen to.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing 5‑star review praises both the musical performance (standout debut of Unbroken Chains, high energy) and the crisp soundboard recording, warranting a near‑top rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the audio "very crisp" and "respectable," indicating clear, well‑balanced sound with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall vibe described as awesome and intense; band was fully engaged throughout the performance.
